team_name: Sentinel AI – AI-Assisted Deepfake Forensics and Victim Support Platform
summary: Build an AI system for deepfake forensics and victim support, focusing on decision support rather than full automation. The system should handle complex, inconsistent legal PDFs, output explainable and verifiable results, and generate a structured action plan.
constraints_addressed: Outputs must be explainable and verifiable
Focus on decision support, not full automation
